name: support_session
note: A customer support session for the capstone. Each request carries the catalog fields (intent, authorized, confirmed) and the escalation fields (impact, in_policy, user_requested_human, must_escalate), so one request drives all three composed engines. c1 is a routine read. c2 is an authorized, confirmed high-impact write that the gate should govern, not the escalation policy. c3 is an unauthorized, out-of-policy account closure that must reach a human before any action. c4 is an explicit request for a human on an otherwise routine read.

requests.description: Customer asks where their order is. Routine read.
An authorized agent cancels an order and confirms the action.
An unauthorized request to close an account. Out of policy and high impact.
The customer explicitly asks to speak to a human agent.
